slots.notes: Navbar logo: flat-inline svg default-to current-color, not a standalone image. Inline svg version is simple, three bar stacks / circles that looks bold at 24px and clean at 32px. It has no separate asset and must be wholly inline in the JSX.

Navbar user avatar. Rounded-full, small, profile photo. Nothing fancy. Use a stock profile picture. The reference photo is of a woman at computer - this can be reused. If you use your own, keep it professional and not too distracting. Independent of the app's tone - simply a person using the app.

Main output area, displaying the most recent or selected generated image. The reference photo is of a dreamy blue space scene with a starship. This is the only image in the reference so it can be re-used for both the output area and as a history thumbnail. If you use your own source image, try to match the dreamy space theme. No filters or panels on top - should be the raw output.

mechanic: Pure CSS grid layout with a fixed navbar, left sidebar of settings / history, and main area showing the image input + output grid. Nothing moves or animates.
techDelivery: React + CSS modules (loader config) + postcss. No Framer Motion.
reskingNotes: All copy is hardcoded in JSX JavaScript markup. There are no repository or management screens in the spec - just a simple dashboard with an input, a grid of generated images, a sidebar with settings and another with history. There is no data interactivity such as typing or scrolling. No variables or tokens or tpanels - colors are all raw #FF / #888 / #333 / #1a1a / #111111 literals. Layout numbers are static 1fr/full width and not breaks. The grid is 2 or 3 columns statically with gap, 2rows or more. There is no save, export, or download functionality. This is a static demo of an image generator app.
